magician.en: The magician pulled a rabbit from his hat.
magician.zh: 魔術師從帽子裡變出一隻兔子。

maid.en: The maid cleaned the guest rooms.

mall.en: We spent the afternoon at the mall.
mall.zh: 我們在購物中心度過了下午。

mankind-humankind.en: Clean water is important for all mankind.
mankind-humankind.zh: 乾淨的水對全人類都很重要。

marble.en: The floor is made of white marble.
marble.zh: 地板是用白色大理石做的。

march.en: The soldiers marched down the street.

marker.en: She wrote the title with a red marker.
marker.zh: 她用紅色麥克筆寫標題。

marvelous.en: We had a marvelous time at the beach.
marvelous.zh: 我們在海灘玩得很愉快。

mathematical.en: He solved a difficult mathematical problem.
mathematical.zh: 他解開了一道困難的數學題。

mayor.en: The mayor opened the new library.

meadow.en: Cows grazed in the green meadow.
meadow.zh: 牛在綠色的草地上吃草。

meaningful.zh: 她給了一個有意義的回答。

meanwhile.en: I cooked dinner; meanwhile, he set the table.
meanwhile.zh: 我煮晚餐，同時他擺好餐具。

medal.en: She won a gold medal in swimming.
medal.zh: 她在游泳項目贏得金牌。

medium-media.en: The news spread through social media.
medium-media.zh: 消息透過社群媒體傳開。

melon.en: This melon is sweet and cool.

melt.en: The ice melted in the warm sun.
melt.zh: 冰在溫暖的陽光下融化了。

mental.en: Exercise is good for your mental health.
mental.zh: 運動有益你的心理健康。

merry.en: We wish you a merry Christmas.

microwave.en: Heat the soup in the microwave.

mighty.en: The mighty river flowed to the sea.
mighty.zh: 這條強大的河流向大海。

miracle.en: It was a miracle that he survived.

misery.en: The war brought misery to many.

missile.en: The missile flew across the sky.

missing.en: A page is missing from this book.

mission.en: Their mission was to save the village.
mission.zh: 他們的任務是拯救村莊。

mob.en: An angry mob gathered in the street.
mob.zh: 一群憤怒的暴民聚集在街上。

moist.en: The cake was soft and moist.

moisture.zh: 植物需要水分才能生長。

monk.en: The monk lived a quiet life.
monk.zh: 那位僧侶過著平靜的生活。

monster.en: The child was afraid of the monster.

monthly.en: We have a monthly class meeting.

moral.en: The story teaches a good moral.
moral.zh: 這個故事教導了一個好道理。

mosquito.en: A mosquito bit me on the arm.
mosquito.zh: 一隻蚊子叮了我的手臂。

motel.en: We stayed at a roadside motel.
motel.zh: 我們住在路邊的汽車旅館。

moth.en: A moth flew toward the light.

multiply.en: Multiply three by four to get twelve.

murder.en: The police solved the murder case.
murder.zh: 警方破解了這起謀殺案。

mushroom.en: We put mushrooms in the soup.

mystery.en: The old house is full of mystery.

naked.en: You can't see germs with the naked eye.

nap.en: I take a short nap after lunch.

napkin.en: She wiped her mouth with a napkin.

navy.en: His brother serves in the navy.

necessity.en: Water is a necessity of life.

necktie.en: He wore a blue necktie to work.

neighborhood.en: We live in a quiet neighborhood.
neighborhood.zh: 我們住在一個安靜的社區。

nest.en: The bird built a nest in the tree.

normal.en: It is normal to feel nervous before a test.

novelist.zh: 這位小說家寫了十本書。

nun.en: The nun helped the poor in the village.
nun.zh: 那位修女幫助村裡的窮人。

oak.en: A tall oak grew in the garden.
oak.zh: 花園裡長著一棵高大的橡樹。

observe.en: We observed the stars through a telescope.
observe.zh: 我們用望遠鏡觀察星星。

occasion.en: A wedding is a special occasion.

odd.en: I heard an odd sound at night.
odd.zh: 我晚上聽到一個奇怪的聲音。

omit.zh: 不要漏掉任何重要的細節。

onto.en: The cat jumped onto the table.

operation.en: The doctor performed a difficult operation.
operation.zh: 醫生進行了一場困難的手術。

opportunity.en: This is a great opportunity to learn.
opportunity.zh: 這是個很好的學習機會。

opposite.en: The bank is opposite the post office.

optimistic.en: She is optimistic about the future.

oral.en: We have an oral English test today.

organize.en: She organized the books on the shelf.

original.en: This is the original painting, not a copy.

outdoor.en: We enjoy outdoor activities like hiking.
outdoor.zh: 我們喜歡健行等戶外活動。

outdoors.en: The children played outdoors all day.

outer.en: The outer wall is painted white.

outline.en: Write an outline before your essay.

oven.en: She baked the cake in the oven.

owe.en: I owe my friend ten dollars.

ownership.en: He has ownership of the small shop.

ox.en: The ox pulled the heavy cart.

pad.en: She wrote a note on a small pad.
pad.zh: 她在一個小便條本上寫了張字條。

painter.en: The painter sold many of his works.
painter.zh: 這位畫家賣出了許多作品。

pal.en: He is an old pal of mine.

palace.en: The king lived in a grand palace.
palace.zh: 國王住在一座宏偉的宮殿裡。

palm.en: She held the coin in her palm.

pancake.en: We had pancakes with syrup for breakfast.
pancake.zh: 我們早餐吃了淋糖漿的鬆餅。

panic.en: Don't panic if the lights go out.

parade.en: We watched the parade on the main street.

parcel.en: A parcel arrived for you today.

parrot.en: The parrot can say a few words.

passage.en: Read the passage and answer the questions.
passage.zh: 閱讀這段文章並回答問題。

passenger.en: Every passenger must wear a seatbelt.
passenger.zh: 每位乘客都必須繫安全帶。

passion.en: She has a passion for music.

passport.en: Don't forget your passport for the trip.

pause.en: He paused for a moment before answering.

pave.en: Workers paved the road with stones.

pea.en: She added green peas to the rice.

pearl.en: The necklace has a single white pearl.
pearl.zh: 這條項鍊有一顆白色珍珠。

peel.en: Please peel the apple for the baby.

penguin.en: Penguins live in very cold places.
penguin.zh: 企鵝住在非常寒冷的地方。

penny.en: He saved every penny he earned.
penny.zh: 他把賺的每一分錢都存起來。

pepper.en: Add a little pepper to the soup.

performance.en: Her performance on stage was amazing.
performance.zh: 她在舞台上的表演很驚人。

permission.en: You need permission to leave early.
permission.zh: 你需要許可才能提早離開。

permit.en: The rules do not permit running here.
permit.zh: 規定不允許在這裡奔跑。

persuade.en: She persuaded me to join the club.

photographer.en: The photographer took our family photo.
photographer.zh: 攝影師為我們拍了全家福。

pigeon.en: A pigeon landed on the windowsill.

pile.en: There was a pile of clothes on the bed.

pill.en: Take this pill twice a day.

pilot.en: The pilot landed the plane safely.
pilot.zh: 飛行員安全地降落了飛機。

pine.en: Tall pine trees grow on the mountain.
pine.zh: 高大的松樹生長在山上。

pineapple.en: This pineapple is sweet and sour.

pint.en: He drank a pint of milk.

pit.en: They dug a deep pit in the ground.
pit.zh: 他們在地上挖了一個深坑。

pitch.en: The pitch of her voice was very high.

pity.en: It's a pity you can't come.

playful.en: The playful kitten chased the ball.

plenty.en: There is plenty of food for everyone.
plenty.zh: 有足夠的食物給每個人。

plug.en: Put the plug into the socket.

pole.en: The flag hung on a tall pole.

politician.en: The politician gave a long speech.
politician.zh: 那位政治人物發表了長篇演說。

poll.en: A poll showed most people agreed.
poll.zh: 一項民調顯示大多數人同意。

pollute.en: Factories should not pollute the river.

pollution.en: Air pollution is bad for our health.
pollution.zh: 空氣污染對我們的健康有害。

porcelain.en: The cup is made of fine porcelain.
porcelain.zh: 這個杯子是用精緻的瓷做的。

portion.en: She gave a large portion of food to him.

portrait.en: A portrait of the queen hung on the wall.

poster.en: He put a movie poster on his wall.
poster.zh: 他在牆上貼了一張電影海報。

postpone.en: They postponed the game because of rain.
postpone.zh: 他們因為下雨延後了比賽。

pottery.en: She makes beautiful pottery by hand.
pottery.zh: 她手工製作美麗的陶器。

pour.en: Please pour me a glass of water.

poverty.zh: 許多家庭生活在貧窮中。

powder.en: Mix the powder with warm water.

practical.en: She gave me some practical advice.
practical.zh: 她給了我一些實用的建議。

precious.zh: 和家人相處的時間很珍貴。

presence.en: Her presence made everyone feel calm.
presence.zh: 她的在場讓大家感到平靜。

pretend.en: The children pretended to be pirates.
pretend.zh: 孩子們假裝自己是海盜。

previous.en: I learned this in the previous lesson.

probable.en: It is probable that he will win.

process.en: Learning a language is a slow process.
process.zh: 學語言是個緩慢的過程。

producer.en: The producer made a popular movie.
producer.zh: 這位製作人拍了一部受歡迎的電影。

professor.en: The professor teaches history at college.
professor.zh: 這位教授在大學教歷史。

profit.en: The shop made a good profit this year.

promote.en: They promote healthy eating at school.
promote.zh: 他們在學校推廣健康飲食。

pronounce.en: Can you pronounce this word correctly?
pronounce.zh: 你能正確地念出這個字嗎？

proof.en: Do you have any proof of what you say?
proof.zh: 你說的話有什麼證據嗎？
